metadata.title: Typewriter Mode
metadata.description: Typewriter scrolling, highlighting of the current line, dimming of unfocused paragraphs, writing focus and more.

regex.source: .setName("Maximum number of characters per line")
.setName("Typewriter offset")
.setDesc(`The color of the current line highlight in ${this.themeMode} themes`)
regex.target: .setDesc(`当前行的颜色在${this.themeMode}主题中突出显示`)

regex.source: .setDesc("The amount of lines to always keep above and below the current line")
regex.target: .setDesc("始终保持在当前行之上和之下的行数")

regex.source: .setDesc("The maximum number of characters per line")
.addHeading("Typewriter")
.setName(`Current line highlight color in ${this.themeMode} themes`)
.setName("Current line highlight style")
.setName("Current line underline thickness")
.setName("Intensity of the fade lines gradient")
.setName("Dimming behavior in unfocused notes")
.setName("Dim unfocused mode")
.setName("Opacity of dimmed elements")
.setName("Amount of lines above and below the current line")
.setName("Writing focus vignette style")
.setDesc("The style of the current line highlight")
.setDesc("The thickness of the underline that highlights the current line")
.setDesc("How soon lines shall be faded out")
.setDesc("How to dim paragraphs / sentences in notes / editors that your cursor is not on (e.g. if you have multiple notes open in split panes)")
regex.target: .setDesc("如何在光标不在的笔记/编辑器中淡化段落/句子（例如，如果您在拆分窗格中打开了多个笔记）")

regex.source: .setDesc("Choose to dim unfocused paragraphs or sentences")
regex.target: .setDesc("淡化非聚焦的段落或句子的选项")

regex.source: .setDesc("The opacity of dimmed elements")
.setDesc("Positions the typewriter line at the specified percentage of the screen")
regex.target: .setDesc("将当前行定位在屏幕的指定百分比处")

regex.source: .setDesc("The style of the vignette in writing focus mode")
.addHeading("Keep lines above and below")
.addHeading("Highlight current line")
.addHeading("Dimming")
.addHeading("Limit line width")
.addHeading("Writing focus")
.addHeading("Update notice and funding")
settingTitle="Activate Typewriter Mode"
settingDesc="This enables or disables all the features below."
regex.target: settingDesc="这将启用或禁用以下所有功能"

regex.source: settingTitle="Only activate after first interaction"
settingDesc="Activate the focused line highlight and paragraph dimming only after the first interaction with the editor"
regex.target: settingDesc="仅在与编辑器第一次交互后激活聚焦行高亮显示和段落变暗"

regex.source: settingTitle="Typewriter scrolling"
settingDesc="Turns typewriter scrolling on or off"
regex.target: settingDesc="打开或关闭打字机滚动"

regex.source: settingTitle="Only maintain typewriter offset when reached"
regex.target: settingTitle="仅在达到时激活打字机"

regex.source: settingDesc="The line that the cursor is on will not be scrolled to the center of the editor until it the specified typewriter offset is reached. This removes the additional space at the top of the editor."
regex.target: settingDesc="光标所在的行在达到指定的打字机偏移量之前不会滚动到编辑器的中心。这会删除编辑器顶部的额外空间"

regex.source: settingTitle="Do not snap typewriter with arrow keys"
regex.target: settingTitle="方向键不触发打字机滚动"

regex.source: settingDesc="The typewriter will only snap when using this plugin's move commands. It will not snap when using the arrow keys. The move commands are by default Cmd/Ctrl+ArrowUp/ArrowDown, but you can assign your own hotkeys for the move commands in Obsidian's settings."
regex.target: settingDesc="打字机不会因使用方向键而滚动，除非按下插件的滚动命令，滚动命令默认为 Cmd/Ctrl+ArrowUp/ArrowDown, 但是你可以在Obsidian设置自己的快捷键."

regex.source: this.addText("Not available if typewriter scrolling is activated")
regex.target: this.addText("如果激活了【打字机滚动】则不可用")

regex.source: settingTitle="Keep lines above and below"
settingDesc="When enabled, always keeps the specified amount of lines above and below the current line in view"
regex.target: settingDesc="启用后，始终保持窗口中至少存在指定数量的行在当前行的上方和下方"

regex.source: settingTitle="Highlight current line"
settingDesc="Highlights the line that the cursor is currently on"
settingTitle="Fade lines"
settingDesc="This places a gradient on the lines above and below the current line, making the text fade out more and more towards the top and bottom of the editor."
regex.target: settingDesc="这会使当前行的上下段落逐渐淡化，使文本向编辑器的顶部和底部淡出"

regex.source: settingTitle="Highlight current line only in focused note"
regex.target: settingTitle="仅在聚焦的笔记中高亮当前行"

regex.source: settingDesc="Only show highlighted line in the note your cursor is on (e.g. if you have multiple notes open in split panes)"
regex.target: settingDesc="（如果您在拆分窗格中打开了多个笔记）仅在光标所在的笔记中高亮行"

regex.source: settingTitle="Dim unfocused"
settingDesc="Dim unfocused paragraphs / sentences"
regex.target: settingDesc="淡化未聚焦的段落/句子"

regex.source: settingTitle="Highlight list parents"
settingDesc="If this is enabled, the parent items of the active list item are not dimmed"
regex.target: settingDesc="如果启用此选项，活动列表项的父项不会淡化"

regex.source: settingTitle="Undim all table cells when editing"
regex.target: settingTitle="编辑时取消所有表格单元格的淡化"

regex.source: settingDesc="If this is enabled, all table cells are shown/not dimmed when you edit a table. If this is disabled, only the current table cell that you are editing is shown, while the other cells remain dimmed."
regex.target: settingDesc="如果启用此选项，则编辑表格时所有表格单元格都不会变暗。如果禁用此选项，仅显示您正在编辑的单元格，而其他单元格保持淡化。"

regex.source: settingTitle="Pause dimming while scrolling"
settingDesc="If this is enabled, paragraphs / sentences are not dimmed while scrolling"
regex.target: settingDesc="如果启用此选项，滚动时文本不会淡化"

regex.source: settingTitle="Limit maximum number of characters per line"
regex.target: settingTitle="限制每行的最大字符数"

regex.source: settingDesc="Limits the maximum number of characters per line"
regex.target: settingDesc="限制每行的最大字符数"

regex.source: settingTitle="Show header in writing focus"
settingDesc="If enabled, the header will be shown in writing focus"
regex.target: settingDesc="启用后，专注模式中将显示标题"

regex.source: settingTitle="Show status bar in writing focus"
settingDesc="If enabled, the status bar will be shown in writing focus"
regex.target: settingDesc="启用后，专注模式中将显示状态栏"

regex.source: settingTitle="Make Obsidian fullscreen in writing focus"
settingDesc="If enabled, the Obsidian window will toggle to fullscreen when entering writing focus"
regex.target: settingDesc="启用后，Obsidian界面将在专注模式下切换到全屏"

regex.source: settingTitle="Writing focus vignette"
settingDesc="Add a vignette to the edges of the screen in writing focus"
regex.target: settingDesc="专注模式下，在屏幕边缘增加阴影"

regex.source: settingTitle="Announce updates"
settingDesc="If enabled you will get a notice with release notes whenever you install a new version of Typewriter Mode"
regex.target: settingDesc="如果启用，每当安装新版本的Typewriter Mode时，您都会收到带有发行说明的通知"

regex.source: this.addText("Not available if \"keep lines above and below\" is activated")
regex.target: this.addText("如果激活了【在顶端和底端保留行】则不可用")

regex.source: settingTitle="Pause dimming while selecting text"
settingDesc="If this is enabled, paragraphs / sentences are not dimmed while selecting text"
regex.target: settingDesc="开启后，在选择文本时段落/句子不会被淡化"

regex.source: .addOption("box","Box")
.addOption("underline","Underline")
.addOption("column","Column")
.addOption("dim-none","Do not dim anything")
.addOption("dim","Dim all but the previously focused paragraph / sentence")
.addOption("dim-all","Dim everything")
.addOption("paragraphs","Paragraphs")
.addOption("sentences","Sentences")
